Nanjing Chunying Semi-Conductor Illumination Technology Co., Ltd. presents a textbook case of an asset-light engineering and project bidding shell. Despite being incorrectly categorized as a 'Medium' sized manufacturing enterprise due to its fully paid-in capital of 10.1 million RMB, it reported 0 insured employees in 2024. Furthermore, its registered address is 'Room 1101, No. 2 Taiping South Road'—a prominent commercial high-rise in Nanjing's historic jewelry and commerce district, completely unsuitable for the heavy manufacturing of 'LED street lights and poles'. The entity operates strictly as a zero-employee capital vehicle, leveraging its 10 million RMB registered capital to bid on municipal 'landscape lighting projects' and 'intelligent system installations', subsequently subcontracting all physical production and installation work.
